shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
editor.title: tile editor
atomizer.title: atomizers
explorer.title: OPFS Explorer
format-painter.title: Format Painter
format-painter.empty: No visual properties on this tile
portal.title: portal
history.title: browser history
slash.keyword: Add or remove keywords (tags) on selected tiles
slash.meeting: Start or join a video meeting on the selected tile
slash.remove: Remove tiles from the current directory
slash.format: Copy visual formatting from the active tile
slash.layout: Save, apply, list, or remove layout templates
slash.move: Toggle move mode for drag-reordering tiles
slash.expand: Expand selected tiles into constituent parts via Claude Haiku
slash.accent: Set the hover accent color by name
guide.title: Learning Guide
guide.tip.title: New skill unlocked
guide.welcome.title: Welcome
guide.welcome.description: Your first steps in the Hypercomb workspace
guide.welcome.step-explore: Look around — your workspace is a hexagonal grid of tiles
guide.welcome.step-command: Press Ctrl+Space to focus the command line
guide.welcome.step-help: Type /guide to open this learning guide anytime
guide.welcome.toast-message: Type /guide to open the learning guide, or press Ctrl+Space to start creating.
guide.create-cell.title: Creating Tiles
guide.create-cell.description: Tiles are the building blocks of your workspace
guide.create-cell.step-focus: Focus the command line with Ctrl+Space
guide.create-cell.step-type: Type a name and press Enter to create a tile
guide.create-cell.step-nested: Use slashes to create nested folders: projects/ideas/draft
guide.navigate.title: Keyboard Navigation
guide.navigate.description: Move through the hex grid with your keyboard
guide.navigate.step-arrows: Use arrow keys to move between tiles
guide.navigate.step-enter: Press Enter on a folder to navigate into it
guide.navigate.step-back: Press Backspace or click the back button to go up
guide.pan-zoom.title: Pan and Zoom
guide.pan-zoom.description: Navigate the canvas freely with mouse and touch
guide.pan-zoom.step-pan: Hold Space and drag to pan the view
guide.pan-zoom.step-zoom: Scroll the mousewheel to zoom in and out
guide.pan-zoom.step-fit: Click the fit-to-content button to auto-frame your tiles
guide.tile-editor.title: Editing Tiles
guide.tile-editor.description: Customize tiles with images, links, colors, and more
guide.tile-editor.step-select: Select a tile, then click the edit action
guide.tile-editor.step-image: Upload or drop an image onto the tile
guide.tile-editor.step-link: Add a URL to make the tile a link
guide.tile-editor.step-save: Press Save to apply your changes
guide.clipboard.title: Clipboard
guide.clipboard.description: Copy, cut, and paste tiles between folders
guide.clipboard.step-copy: Press C to copy the selected tile
guide.clipboard.step-cut: Press X to cut (copy + mark for removal)
guide.clipboard.step-paste: Press Enter in a destination folder to paste
guide.move-tiles.title: Moving Tiles
guide.move-tiles.description: Reorder tiles by dragging or using the move command
guide.move-tiles.step-drag: Drag tiles to reorder them on the grid
guide.move-tiles.step-layout: Type /layout save to save your arrangement as a template
guide.keywords.title: Keywords and Tags
guide.keywords.step-add: Type /keyword tag-name to add a tag to selected tiles
guide.keywords.step-filter: Type >?tag-name in the command line to filter by tag
guide.mesh.title: Mesh Networking
guide.mesh.description: Go public to share your workspace over Nostr relays
guide.mesh.step-toggle: Press Shift+P to toggle between solo and public mode
guide.mesh.step-relay: In public mode your tiles sync with connected peers
guide.mesh.step-meeting: Type /meeting to start a live video call on a tile
guide.command-palette.title: Command Palette
guide.command-palette.description: Quickly find and run any command
guide.command-palette.step-open: Press Ctrl+K to open the command palette
guide.command-palette.step-search: Type to fuzzy-search through all available commands
guide.command-palette.step-recent: Your recently used commands appear first
guide.slash-commands.title: Slash Commands
guide.slash-commands.description: Powerful commands right from the command line
guide.slash-commands.step-type: Type / in the command line to see all commands
guide.slash-commands.step-autocomplete: Use Tab to autocomplete a command name
guide.shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
guide.shortcuts.description: Master the keyboard for maximum speed
guide.shortcuts.step-view: Press / to view all keyboard shortcuts
guide.shortcuts.step-escape: Press Escape to cancel any active action or close any panel
guide.shortcuts.step-palette: Press Ctrl+K for the command palette — your fastest route to any action
confirm.delete-message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
confirm.delete-children-warning: This item contains children that will also be permanently deleted.
